creator: yarodin@gmail.com
text:
Update to 1.3.2

- Remove check for old cfg in geoip_server_config - we assume exactly one allocation per server
- Skip files that we can not open for some reason ( permission/typo ). Check and skip empty slots in geoip_header_parser
- Fix assume no configdata, if s->module_config == NULL in geoip_server_config 
- Move declaration before any C statement. That makes ISO C90 Compilers happy gcc < 3

Fix: How to apply:
1) Put patch-mod_geoip.txt to /usr/ports/www/
2) cd /usr/ports/www/ && patch -E -p <patch-mod_geoip.txt && find /usr/ports/www/mod_geoip/ -type f -name "*.orig" -exec rm -f {} \;

Patch attached with submission follows:
